---
title: "ALD_FDA_Dissertation"
author: "Suryadyuti Baral"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

### GF

```{r}
library(data.table)

# Load data
ald_dat <- fread(
  "~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/dissertation_dat/Dissertation_Selection.csv",
  na.strings = "."
)

# Setup
response_vars <- c("GF1", "GF2")
time_vars <- c("age1", "age2")

# Step 1: Filter rows where all non-missing ages are between 5 and 22
valid_indices <- apply(ald_dat[, ..time_vars], 1, function(row) all(is.na(row) | (row >= 5 & row <= 22)))
ald_dat <- ald_dat[valid_indices]

# Step 2: Construct Lt and Ly with -500 shift, check count >= 2
tmp <- lapply(1:nrow(ald_dat), function(i) {
  y <- unlist(ald_dat[i, ..response_vars])
  t <- unlist(ald_dat[i, ..time_vars])
  
  keep <- !(is.na(y) | is.na(t))  # keep only valid pairs
  y <- y[keep]
  t <- t[keep]
  
  if (length(y) >= 2) {
    list(Ly = y - 500, Lt = t)
  } else {
    NULL  # discard subjects with < 2 values
  }
})

# Step 3: Drop NULL entries (subjects with < 2 values)
tmp <- Filter(Negate(is.null), tmp)

# Step 4: Extract Ly and Lt
Ly <- lapply(tmp, `[[`, "Ly")
Lt <- lapply(tmp, `[[`, "Lt")

# Step 5: Prepare for modeling
unique_ages <- sort(unique(unlist(Lt)))
first_fr_scores <- na.omit(sapply(Ly, function(y) if (length(y)) y[1] else NA))
sort(unique_ages)
```

```{r}
# Load model code
source("~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/ldm.R")
source("~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/kerFctn.R")
source("~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/Rfunctions.R")

# Fit model with regular time grid
set.seed(1)
age <- 5:22
z02 <- generate_initial_values(Lt_list = Lt, Ly_list = Ly, age_grid = age, m = 4, method = "normal")
acd_fda_2 <- ldm(Ly, Lt, z02, age, optns = list(M = nrow(z02), cores = 24, regular = FALSE))

saveRDS(acd_fda_2, file = "~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/dissertation_dat/GF_dissertation_ALD_sim_curves.rds")
```

```{r}
results <- evaluate_simulations(tfine = seq(5,22, length.out = 18*12), 
                                sim_al_data = list(Ly = Ly, Lt = Lt), sim_data = NULL, 
                                acd_fda_2 = acd_fda_2, plot = TRUE, 
                                plot_subjects = c(38, 438))

mean(results$mse_opt)
mean(results$bias_opt)
```
```{r}
sim_al_data <- list(Ly = Ly, Lt = Lt, x_full = seq(5,22, length.out = 18*12))
data <- convert_to_full_subject_list(sim_al_data)
LCS_SSM <- run_full_kalman_simulation(data, sim_data = NULL)
results2 <- suppressWarnings(evaluate_lcsssm(LCS_SSM, sim_data = NULL, 
                                             sim_al_data, plot = TRUE,
                                             plot_subjects = c(38, 438)))

mean(results2$mse)
mean(results2$bias)

saveRDS(LCS_SSM, file = "~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/dissertation_dat/GF_dissertation_ALD_sim_curves.rds")
```


### GAK
```{r}
ald_dat <- fread("C:/Users/sonnet/Box/FDA/Emilio_dissertation/Dissertation_Selection.csv", na.strings = ".")
response_vars <- c("GAK1", "GAK2")

# Step 1: Filter rows where all non-missing ages are between 5 and 22
valid_indices <- apply(ald_dat[, ..time_vars], 1, function(row) all(is.na(row) | (row >= 5 & row <= 22)))
ald_dat <- ald_dat[valid_indices]

# Step 2: Construct Lt and Ly with -500 shift, check count >= 2
tmp <- lapply(1:nrow(ald_dat), function(i) {
  y <- unlist(ald_dat[i, ..response_vars])
  t <- unlist(ald_dat[i, ..time_vars])
  
  keep <- !(is.na(y) | is.na(t))  # keep only valid pairs
  y <- y[keep]
  t <- t[keep]
  
  if (length(y) >= 2) {
    list(Ly = y - 500, Lt = t)
  } else {
    NULL  # discard subjects with < 2 values
  }
})

# Step 3: Drop NULL entries (subjects with < 2 values)
tmp <- Filter(Negate(is.null), tmp)

# Step 4: Extract Ly and Lt
Ly <- lapply(tmp, `[[`, "Ly")
Lt <- lapply(tmp, `[[`, "Lt")

# Step 5: Prepare for modeling
unique_ages <- sort(unique(unlist(Lt)))
first_fr_scores <- na.omit(sapply(Ly, function(y) if (length(y)) y[1] else NA))
sort(unique_ages)
```

```{r}
# Load model code
source("~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/ldm.R")
source("~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/kerFctn.R")
source("~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/Rfunctions.R")

# Fit model with regular time grid
set.seed(1)
age <- 5:22
z02 <- generate_initial_values(Lt_list = Lt, Ly_list = Ly, age_grid = age, m = 4, method = "normal")
acd_fda_2 <- ldm(Ly, Lt, z02, age, optns = list(M = nrow(z02), cores = 24, regular = FALSE))

saveRDS(acd_fda_2, file = "~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/dissertation_dat/GAK_dissertation_ALD_sim_curves.rds")
```

```{r}
results <- evaluate_simulations(tfine = seq(5,22, length.out = 18*12), 
                                sim_al_data = list(Ly = Ly, Lt = Lt), sim_data = NULL, 
                                acd_fda_2 = acd_fda_2, plot = TRUE, 
                                plot_subjects = c(79, 154, 464, 461))

mean(results$mse_opt)
mean(results$bias_opt)
```
```{r}
sim_al_data <- list(Ly = Ly, Lt = Lt, x_full = seq(5,22, length.out = 18*12))
data <- convert_to_full_subject_list(sim_al_data)
LCS_SSM <- run_full_kalman_simulation(data, sim_data = NULL)
results2 <- suppressWarnings(evaluate_lcsssm(LCS_SSM, sim_data = NULL, 
                                             sim_al_data, plot = TRUE,
                                             plot_subjects = c(79, 154, 464, 461)))

mean(results2$mse)
mean(results2$bias)

saveRDS(LCS_SSM, file = "~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/dissertation_dat/GAK_dissertation_ALD_LCS.rds")
```



### GC
```{r}
ald_dat <- fread("C:/Users/sonnet/Box/FDA/Emilio_dissertation/Dissertation_Selection.csv", na.strings = ".")
response_vars <- c("GC1", "GC2")

# Step 1: Filter rows where all non-missing ages are between 5 and 22
valid_indices <- apply(ald_dat[, ..time_vars], 1, function(row) all(is.na(row) | (row >= 5 & row <= 22)))
ald_dat <- ald_dat[valid_indices]

# Step 2: Construct Lt and Ly with -500 shift, check count >= 2
tmp <- lapply(1:nrow(ald_dat), function(i) {
  y <- unlist(ald_dat[i, ..response_vars])
  t <- unlist(ald_dat[i, ..time_vars])
  
  keep <- !(is.na(y) | is.na(t))  # keep only valid pairs
  y <- y[keep]
  t <- t[keep]
  
  if (length(y) >= 2) {
    list(Ly = y - 500, Lt = t)
  } else {
    NULL  # discard subjects with < 2 values
  }
})

# Step 3: Drop NULL entries (subjects with < 2 values)
tmp <- Filter(Negate(is.null), tmp)

# Step 4: Extract Ly and Lt
Ly <- lapply(tmp, `[[`, "Ly")
Lt <- lapply(tmp, `[[`, "Lt")

# Step 5: Prepare for modeling
unique_ages <- sort(unique(unlist(Lt)))
first_fr_scores <- na.omit(sapply(Ly, function(y) if (length(y)) y[1] else NA))
sort(unique_ages)
```

```{r}
# Load model code
source("~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/ldm.R")
source("~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/kerFctn.R")
source("~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/Rfunctions.R")

# Fit model with regular time grid
set.seed(1)
age <- 5:22
z02 <- generate_initial_values(Lt_list = Lt, Ly_list = Ly, age_grid = age, m = 4, method = "normal")
acd_fda_2 <- ldm(Ly, Lt, z02, age, optns = list(M = nrow(z02), cores = 24, regular = FALSE))

saveRDS(acd_fda_2, file = "~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/dissertation_dat/GC_dissertation_ALD_sim_curves.rds")
```

```{r}
results <- evaluate_simulations(tfine = seq(5,22, length.out = 18*12), 
                                sim_al_data = list(Ly = Ly, Lt = Lt), sim_data = NULL, 
                                acd_fda_2 = acd_fda_2, plot = TRUE, 
                                plot_subjects = c(1, 96, 422))

mean(results$mse_opt)
mean(results$bias_opt)
```
```{r}
sim_al_data <- list(Ly = Ly, Lt = Lt, x_full = seq(5,22, length.out = 18*12))
data <- convert_to_full_subject_list(sim_al_data)
LCS_SSM <- run_full_kalman_simulation(data, sim_data = NULL)
results2 <- suppressWarnings(evaluate_lcsssm(LCS_SSM, sim_data = NULL, 
                                             sim_al_data, plot = TRUE,
                                             plot_subjects = c(1, 96, 422)))

mean(results2$mse)
mean(results2$bias)

saveRDS(LCS_SSM, file = "~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/dissertation_dat/GC_dissertation_ALD_LCS.rds")
```


### GQ
```{r}
ald_dat <- fread("C:/Users/sonnet/Box/FDA/Emilio_dissertation/Dissertation_Selection.csv", na.strings = ".")
response_vars <- c("GQ1", "GQ2")

# Step 1: Filter rows where all non-missing ages are between 5 and 22
valid_indices <- apply(ald_dat[, ..time_vars], 1, function(row) all(is.na(row) | (row >= 5 & row <= 22)))
ald_dat <- ald_dat[valid_indices]

# Step 2: Construct Lt and Ly with -500 shift, check count >= 2
tmp <- lapply(1:nrow(ald_dat), function(i) {
  y <- unlist(ald_dat[i, ..response_vars])
  t <- unlist(ald_dat[i, ..time_vars])
  
  keep <- !(is.na(y) | is.na(t))  # keep only valid pairs
  y <- y[keep]
  t <- t[keep]
  
  if (length(y) >= 2) {
    list(Ly = y - 500, Lt = t)
  } else {
    NULL  # discard subjects with < 2 values
  }
})

# Step 3: Drop NULL entries (subjects with < 2 values)
tmp <- Filter(Negate(is.null), tmp)

# Step 4: Extract Ly and Lt
Ly <- lapply(tmp, `[[`, "Ly")
Lt <- lapply(tmp, `[[`, "Lt")

# Step 5: Prepare for modeling
unique_ages <- sort(unique(unlist(Lt)))
first_fr_scores <- na.omit(sapply(Ly, function(y) if (length(y)) y[1] else NA))
sort(unique_ages)
```

```{r}
# Load model code
source("~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/ldm.R")
source("~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/kerFctn.R")
source("~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/Rfunctions.R")

# Fit model with regular time grid
set.seed(1)
age <- 5:22
z02 <- generate_initial_values(Lt_list = Lt, Ly_list = Ly, age_grid = age, m = 4, method = "normal")
acd_fda_2 <- ldm(Ly, Lt, z02, age, optns = list(M = nrow(z02), cores = 24, regular = FALSE))

saveRDS(acd_fda_2, file = "~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/dissertation_dat/GQ_dissertation_ALD_sim_curves.rds")
```

```{r}
results <- evaluate_simulations(tfine = seq(5,22, length.out = 18*12), 
                                sim_al_data = list(Ly = Ly, Lt = Lt), sim_data = NULL,
                                acd_fda_2 = acd_fda_2, plot = TRUE, 
                                plot_subjects = c(86, 461))

mean(results$mse_opt)
mean(results$bias_opt)
```
```{r}
sim_al_data <- list(Ly = Ly, Lt = Lt, x_full = seq(5,22, length.out = 18*12))
data <- convert_to_full_subject_list(sim_al_data)
LCS_SSM <- run_full_kalman_simulation(data, sim_data = NULL)
results2 <- suppressWarnings(evaluate_lcsssm(LCS_SSM, sim_data = NULL, 
                                             sim_al_data, plot = TRUE,
                                             plot_subjects = c(86, 461)))

mean(results2$mse)
mean(results2$bias)

saveRDS(LCS_SSM, file = "~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/dissertation_dat/GQ_dissertation_ALD_LCS.rds")
```


### NORA dataset

```{r}
ald_dat <- read.table(file = "C:/Users/sonnet/Box/FDA/nora_T3.dat", na.strings = ".", 
                      col.names = c("id", "times", "female", "age1", "age2", "age3", 
                                    "mr1", "mr2", "mr3", "bd1", "bd2", "bd3", 
                                    "cf1", "cf2", "cf3", "as1", "as2", "as3", 
                                    "fr1", "fr2", "fr3", "wvc1", "wvc2", "wvc3",
                                    "gvc1", "gvc2", "gvc3", "cvc1", "cvc2", "cvc3",
                                    "faWMc1", "faWMc2", "faWMc3"))
```
```{r}
library(data.table)
setDT(ald_dat)
response_vars <- c("fr1", "fr2", "fr3")
time_vars <- c("age1", "age2", "age3")

# Step 1: Filter rows where all non-missing ages are between 7 and 22
valid_indices <- apply(ald_dat[, ..time_vars], 1, function(row) all(is.na(row) | (row >= 7 & row <= 22)))
ald_dat <- ald_dat[valid_indices]

# Step 2: Construct Lt and Ly, check count >= 2
tmp <- lapply(1:nrow(ald_dat), function(i) {
  y <- unlist(ald_dat[i, ..response_vars])
  t <- unlist(ald_dat[i, ..time_vars])
  
  keep <- !(is.na(y) | is.na(t))  # keep only valid pairs
  y <- y[keep]
  t <- t[keep]
  
  if (length(y) >= 2) {
    list(Ly = y, Lt = t)
  } else {
    NULL  # discard subjects with < 2 values
  }
})

# Step 3: Drop NULL entries (subjects with < 2 values)
tmp <- Filter(Negate(is.null), tmp)

# Step 4: Extract Ly and Lt
Ly <- lapply(tmp, `[[`, "Ly")
Lt <- lapply(tmp, `[[`, "Lt")

# Step 5: Prepare for modeling
unique_ages <- sort(unique(unlist(Lt)))
first_fr_scores <- na.omit(sapply(Ly, function(y) if (length(y)) y[1] else NA))
sort(unique_ages)
```

```{r}
# Fit model with regular time grid
set.seed(1)
age <- 7:22
tfine <- seq(7,22, length.out = 16*12)
z02 <- generate_initial_values(Lt_list = Lt, Ly_list = Ly, age_grid = age, m = 4, method = "normal", eps = .5)
acd_fda_2 <- ldm(Ly, Lt, z02, age, optns = list(M = nrow(z02), cores = 24, regular = FALSE))

saveRDS(acd_fda_2, file = "~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/dissertation_dat/NORA_ALD_sim_curves.rds")
```
```{r}
results <- evaluate_simulations(tfine = tfine, sim_al_data = list(Ly = Ly, Lt = Lt), sim_data = NULL, acd_fda_2 = acd_fda_2, plot = TRUE, plot_subjects = c(48, 79, 81, 84))

mean(results$mse_opt)
mean(results$bias_opt)
```
```{r}
sim_al_data <- list(Ly = Ly, Lt = Lt, x_full = tfine)
data <- convert_to_full_subject_list(sim_al_data)
LCS_SSM <- run_full_kalman_simulation(data, sim_data = NULL)
results2 <- suppressWarnings(evaluate_lcsssm(LCS_SSM, sim_data = NULL, 
                                             sim_al_data, plot = TRUE, 
                                             plot_subjects = c(48, 79, 81, 84)))

mean(results2$mse)
mean(results2$bias)

saveRDS(LCS_SSM, file = "~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/dissertation_dat/NORA_dissertation_ALD_LCS.rds")
```
